description:
200g beef mince 
1 multigrain wrap 
2 TBS sauce (see recipe from image attached and calculate my eaten value)
3 TBS of lettuce
identifiedFoods: Viral Big Mac Taco Sauce (Mayonnaise, Ketchup, Yellow Mustard, Pickles/Relish, Pickle Juice)
notes: The calculation assumes 200g of cooked 85/15 lean beef mince and a standard large multigrain wrap (approx. 70g). The sauce nutrition was calculated by first determining the total nutrition for the entire recipe (13.5 tablespoons in total) and then scaling it down for the 2 tablespoons consumed. Sweet relish was used for the pickle/relish component. Lettuce macros are negligible for the amount specified.

description:
Breakfast - black coffee
Morning tea - cheese + rice crackers (3 pack)
Lunch - yoghurt cake + mini wholegrain wrap with ham
Afternoon tea - yoghurt cake
notes: Estimates are based on standard serving sizes: 1 slice of cheese (~28g), 3 rice crackers (~24g total), 1 slice of yoghurt cake (~90g) for each serving, 1 mini wrap (~35g), and 2-3 slices of ham (~50g). The calorie and macro content of 'yoghurt cake' can vary significantly depending on the recipe and portion size.

description: Red wine ,+ 1 large piece of Louisiana fried chicken in the airfryer from Costco
identifiedFoods: Louisiana fried chicken (large piece, from Costco)
notes: Estimates are based on a standard 5 fl oz (150ml) glass of dry red wine and a large fried chicken piece (approx. 6 oz / 170g cooked weight), assuming a breaded and pre-fried style common for 'Louisiana fried chicken'. Cooking in an air fryer reheats the chicken but does not significantly alter its original caloric or macronutrient content, which is primarily determined by the chicken itself, its breading, and the oil absorbed during its initial preparation.

description: 40g of air fryer cooked pork shoulder + a fried egg
notes: Estimates based on 40g cooked pork shoulder (lean and fat, roasted/air-fried equivalent) and one large fried egg (cooked with a small amount of oil). Actual values may vary based on fat content of the pork and amount of oil used for frying.

description:
Yoghurt cake + black coffee
Left over air fryer pork on a mini wholegrain wrap with a slice of cheese
Cheese and rice crackers (3 pack) 
2 red wines
1/2 Louisiana fried chicken (Costco)
Costco 1/4 serve tikka masala on half a family size packet brown rice
notes:
Estimates are based on standard serving sizes and common nutritional data for the described items. Specific brands, preparation methods, and exact portion sizes can significantly alter actual values. Key assumptions include:
- Yoghurt cake: One standard slice (~100g).
- Air fryer pork: Approximately 4oz (112g) cooked, moderately lean pork.
- Mini wholegrain wrap: One 6-inch wrap.
- Cheese slice: One standard slice (~28g).
- Cheese and rice crackers (3 pack): A typical pre-packaged snack pack with crackers and cheese (~50g).
- Red wine: Two standard 5oz (150ml) glasses.
- 1/2 Louisiana fried chicken (Costco): Interpreted as one very large piece (e.g., a substantial breast or thigh), accounting for Costco's portion sizes and fried preparation.
- Costco 1/4 serve tikka masala: Interpreted as 1/4 of a family-sized container/meal kit, yielding a substantial individual portion (approx. 1.5-2 cups or 300-400g).
- Half a family size packet brown rice: Interpreted as two standard cooked servings (approx. 2 cups or 360-400g cooked rice).
